raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas KUNGS irr dar-
rijs / ko tas bij nodohmajs /
Wiꞥſch irr ſawu Wahrdn pee-
pildijs/ ko Wiꞥſch bij patwehleje
pagahjuschäs Deenäs / Wiꞥſch
irr nolausijs/ un ne faudsejs/un
irr to Eenaidneeku prett tewi
preezigu darrijs/ un irr to Rag-
gu tawo Prettineeku pa·augsti-
najs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Winno Sirde brehz uhs
to KUNgu / ak tu Muhri tahs
Zianas Meitas/ leez Deenä un
Nakti Affaras notezzeht ka Up-
pe/ un ne dohdees ar Meeru/
un taws Azzuraugs laid ne mit-
tejahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Zellees/ darri Trohktui
Nakti/ kad ſahk tumſch mestees/
tad isgahs preeſſch ta KUNga
tawn Sirde ka Uhdeni / pazell
tawas Rohkas uhs Winnu/ ta-
wu Behrninu Dwehſeles deht/
tas irr pamirruſchi no Badda us
wiſſo Eelu Preeſſch·Galleem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Redſi KUNGS / luhko
jelle/ kam tu ta eſſi darrijs/buhs
tad tahm Seewahn tawas Mee-
tas Augtus ehſt? tohs Behrni-
nus tahda Sprihscha Leeuina?
buhs tad teem Preestereem un
Praueſcheem ta KUNga fweh-
tä Weeta nokauceem tapt?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jaunee un Wezzee guſſ
pee Semmes us Gelahn/ Juin-
prawas un Jauneeti irr zaar
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Sohbinu krittufchi/ Tu effi
tawa Bahrsibas Deena:
wis/ Tu effi nokawis un n
dsejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tu effi mannuſ Js-
zinatajuſ wiſsapkahrt aizi-
ka us weenu nospreefnu Sn
ku Deenn/ un ne irr neween
Deenä tahs Bahrsibas ta Kl
GA tsglahbees jeb atlizzis/
aukleju un audsinajn / tohe
manns Eenaidneeks nokawis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta III. Nodalla.
Jeremijus noschehlo ka pirnak to g
Sohdibu/ ar fo Deews ſawus Laub
peemeſklejs : i. etc. Ar weenu Cepre
ſchanu/ ka Deews pahr teem atkaf ap
loſees : 19. Un ja tee nofirſchu no
Feem atgreeſſees : 40. Winau Eenä
kus apgahſiſs un nomaitabs: 59.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "S efinu tas Wi-
las Behdas irr red
zaur to Rihtſti Wi-
Duſnimbas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch irr manni wedi
un lizzis eet Tumſiba/ un
Gaisma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Teescham/ Wiꞥſch irr pi-
mannis turrejeeſ/ tawu Do-
irr Wiꞥſch apgrohſijs za-
Deenn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch irr mannu Me-
un mannu Ahdu wezzu darri-
mannus Kaulus irr Wiꞥſch
treezis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch irr apkahrt ma-
nim ( Stiprumus ) nstaifij
ar Schulti un Gruhtuma
Wiꞥſch (manni) apdewis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiꞥſch irr manni tumſch
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
